title: YouTube
content: Video sharing platform for uploading, streaming, and discovering content.

title: Spotify
content: Music streaming service with playlists, podcasts, and personalized recommendations.

title: Instagram
content: Photo and video sharing social network with stories, reels, and messaging.

title: Facebook
content: Social networking site for connecting with friends, groups, and communities.

title: Twitter (X)
content: Microblogging platform for sharing short posts, news, and trending topics.

title: TikTok
content: Short-form video platform with creative tools, trends, and viral challenges.

title: Snapchat
content: Messaging app with disappearing snaps, stories, and augmented reality filters.

title: LinkedIn
content: Professional networking site for jobs, business connections, and industry updates.

title: Reddit
content: Community-based platform with forums, discussions, and niche interest groups.

title: Pinterest
content: Visual discovery engine for ideas, inspiration, and creative projects.

title: Discord
content: Chat and community platform with servers, voice channels, and integrations.

title: Tumblr
content: Microblogging and social networking site for creative communities.

title: Threads
content: Text-based social app by Instagram for sharing updates and conversations.

title: WhatsApp Web
content: Messaging app for text, voice, and video communication with end-to-end encryption.

title: Telegram
content: Cloud-based messaging app with channels, bots, and large group support.
